title: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value analysis of Broadcom Inc. using a discounted cash flow (DCF) model and sensitivity analysis.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 16.4% - Based on recent trailing twelve-month revenue growth, buoyed by robust AI infrastructure demand.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 3.5% - Assuming long-term growth driven by secular trends in data center networking and AI semiconductors.
assumptions.discountRate: 9.5% - Estimated WACC, reflecting an elevated beta (1.257) alongside a solid balance sheet.
